response.justification: The candidate has roughly 15+ years of broad full-stack software engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, with solid craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing). However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI thought leadership at scale. The resume shows only recent, peripheral exposure to AI (MCP tooling at current role since April 2025) and no evidence of architecting AI platforms, advising strategic customers, or operating at a director-level IC scope. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage rather than deep cloud platform strategy.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across diverse stacks and domains
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source contributions
Demonstrated knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and founding an open-source GIS platform
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise required for the role
Lacks director-level IC scope: no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping multi-team technical strategy
Limited deep cloud platform expertise; cloud exposure is application-level (AWS CDK) rather than strategic

key_factors.factor: Missing demonstrated AI expertise and products
Long tenure and breadth of engineering experience
